name: @laurigates/comfy-modal-kit
description: Shared modal-shell + fzf-lite fuzzy-matcher primitives for ComfyUI custom-node packs. Single-sourced TypeScript, built to bundled ESM + declarations.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --target browser --format esm --outdir dist && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir dist
